prs.title: fix: portfolio pathway matching case-insensitive + top-level gaps only
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small bug fix across 2 files with 9 custom lines addressing case-insensitive matching and filtering logic for top-level gaps in the portfolio pathway feature.

prs.title: fix: portfolio table co-build/co-market/co-sell columns showing gaps completion
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small bug fix across 2 files with 8 custom lines correcting incorrect data being displayed in co-build/co-market/co-sell columns of the portfolio table.

stories.name: Portfolio Gap Tracking Accuracy Improvements
stories.rationale: Fixed portfolio pathway matching and co-build/co-market/co-sell column displays to ensure gap completion data is calculated and shown accurately across the platform.
